input.headline: The best VPNs I’ve used are reduced ahead of Black Friday

raw.headline: The best VPNs I’ve used are reduced ahead of Black Friday

winner: Why did the VPN provider go on a diet before Black Friday? Because they wanted to squeeze the most deals out of the sale!

candidates.text: Why did the VPN provider go on a diet before Black Friday? Because they wanted to squeeze the most deals out of the sale!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses a pun on 'squeeze,' but it lacks specificity about VPNs and the timing of Black Friday. The humor is mild and not particularly surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did the VPN feel a bit down before Black Friday? Because its deals were getting cut ahead!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses wordplay with 'cut ahead,' but it lacks specificity and the surprise element is weak. The humor is mild and could be more tightly aligned with the context of Black Friday deals."}

candidates.text: Apparently, they're preparing for a darker internet this Black Friday, as even the best VPNs have decided to go incognito.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and ties the headline to a humorous twist about VPNs going incognito, offering surprise and specificity. However, it's slightly wordy and could be more concise for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Which VPN deal is too good to be secure? The one that says "I'll be down in black"!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'black' relating to Black Friday and 'secure,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity about VPNs. The humor is mild and not particularly surprising."}

candidates.text: Even I'm not surprised that the worst VPNs are staying the same for Black Friday.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related but lacks the surprise and specificity needed to be truly funny."}
